payload.answer: Cannot execute admin SQL query. BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false prevents direct database access. Enable debug mode or use standard memory retrieval APIs.
payload.decision: Query blocked - SQL debug mode disabled

entity_resolution.reason: Debug SQL mode is disabled by configuration

payload.intent: Debug SQL query execution with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false

memory_cards.statement: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false, preventing direct SQL query execution

details: Query execution blocked at access control layer

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true to enable debug SQL access
Use standard memory card retrieval methods instead
Contact system administrator to enable debug mode
